item.title: Negotiate a Raise in 48 Hours 💰 • Research industry salary standards. • List your recent achievements. • Draft a confident raise request email. • Schedule a meeting with your manager. • Practice your pitch with a friend. What specific achievements will you highlight to justify your raise? #salary #negotiation #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Negotiate a Raise in 48 Hours 💰 • Research industry salary standards. • List your recent achievements. • Draft a confident raise request email. • Schedule a meeting with your manager. • Practice your pitch with a friend. What specific achievements will you highlight to justify your raise? #salary #negotiation #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
